pages.text: $(o)"Geometry is the language of ascension."$()$(br2)The $(l)Ascension Anchor$() is the second path to ascension — arrange $(l)Mana Transmit Crystals$() in a regular polygon around it and right-click to begin the ritual.

pages.title: Four Patterns
pages.text: Each ascension stage requires its own polygon:$(br)· $(l)3 crystals / R=3$() — $(d)Awakening$()$(br)· $(l)4 crystals / R=4$() — $(e)Tempering$()$(br)· $(l)5 crystals / R=5$() — $(b)Purification$()$(br)· $(l)6 crystals / R=6$() — $(6)Transcendence$()$(br2)Pattern can be rotated freely; angular tolerance is $(l)±5°$().

pages.title: Activation
pages.text: $(l)Right-click$() the anchor with your stage's pending ritual. The anchor validates in order:$(br)1. Pattern (N crystals on R polygon)$(br)2. Ritual prerequisites (kills/casts/level/boss)$(br)3. Items in inventory (consumed on completion)$(br)4. Network mana (drained equally from each crystal's source)$(br2)Any failure tells you exactly what's missing.

pages.title: Ritual Phase
pages.text: Once started:$(br)· $(l)5 seconds$() of beam convergence$(br)· Particles rise from each crystal toward the anchor$(br)· Anchor light pillar grows with progress$(br)· On completion: Ascended title + stage advances$(br2)Crystals are $(l)not consumed$() — only mana and items.

pages.title: Mana Costs
pages.text: Each crystal carries an equal share of the total cost.$(br2)· $(d)Awakening$(): $(l)500$() total$(br)· $(e)Tempering$(): $(l)1200$() total$(br)· $(b)Purification$(): $(l)2800$() total$(br)· $(6)Transcendence$(): $(l)8000$() total$(br2)Place each crystal above a $(l)Mana Reservoir$() or other capability source with enough stock.

pages.title: UI Button Still Works
pages.text: The old $(l)Ascension Tree UI$() button-based ritual is preserved as a fallback. The anchor is a $(l)ceremonial alternative$() — more spatial setup, but no different in reward.$(br2)Both paths consume the same items, both call $(l)tryCompleteRitual$().

pages.title: Datapack Customization
pages.text: All four patterns are data-driven:$(br2)$(l)data/transcend/ascension_patterns/*.json$()$(br2)Adjust crystal count, radius, tolerance, mana cost, or duration per ritual. Reload with $(l)/reload$().
